sizing_rule.note: Scale contract units up only when account equity exceeds the geometric mean threshold, which must be strictly greater than twice the f allocation in dollars (not merely equal to 2×f). This is a geometric growth constraint on optimal f position scaling, preventing premature scale-up.

source_rule_text: Increase contract units to the next level only when account equity exceeds the threshold to the geometric mean, which must be greater than twice the f allocation in dollars, rather than using simple doubling of the f allocation.
